title.en: China-to-Zimbabwe Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入津巴布韦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入辛巴威：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Zimbabwe SAZ conformity and standards evidence, ZERA electricity licensing and net-metering rules, ZETDC grid-connection review, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface requirements, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 230/400 V 50 Hz grid settings, and China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与津巴布韦SAZ合格评定及标准证据、ZERA电力许可和净计量规则、ZETDC并网审查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口要求、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据、230/400 V 50 Hz电网参数，以及中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與辛巴威SAZ合格評定及標準證據、ZERA電力許可和淨計量規則、ZETDC併網審查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面要求、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據、230/400 V 50 Hz電網參數，以及中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SAZ conformity determination, ZERA licensing decision, ZERA net-metering approval, ZETDC connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Zimbabwe has severe and prolonged load-shedding driven by generation shortfalls, including hydro constraints at Kariba and aging thermal capacity, which has accelerated rooftop, C&I, mining, and battery-backed solar uptake. Exporters, importers, designers, mine operators, project owners, and installers should verify current SAZ standards adoption, ZERA electricity licensing and net-metering rules, ZETDC connection conditions, project-owner requirements, and insurance or lender requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SAZ合格评定裁定、ZERA许可决定、ZERA净计量批准、ZETDC并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。津巴布韦因发电短缺而长期严重限电，其中包括Kariba水电受限及老化火电容量问题，推动了户用、工商业、矿业及带电池储能太阳能系统的采用。出口商、进口商、设计方、矿山运营方、项目业主和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行SAZ标准采纳状况、ZERA电力许可和净计量规则、ZETDC接入条件、项目业主要求以及保险或融资方要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SAZ合格評定裁定、ZERA許可決定、ZERA淨計量批准、ZETDC併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。辛巴威因發電短缺而長期嚴重限電，其中包括Kariba水電受限及老化火電容量問題，推動了戶用、工商業、礦業及帶電池儲能太陽能系統的採用。出口商、進口商、設計方、礦山營運方、項目業主和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行SAZ標準採納狀況、ZERA電力許可和淨計量規則、ZETDC接入條件、項目業主要求以及保險或融資方要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Zimbabwe, the key practical gaps are: (1) SAZ conformity and Zimbabwe-adopted IEC standards evidence rather than assuming China GB/T files are accepted; (2) ZERA electricity licensing and net-metering requirements where the project exports, sells, or connects generation above applicable thresholds; (3) ZETDC distribution-network connection review and commissioning conditions; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence; (5) IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence; and (6) IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence for the actual 230/400 V, 50 Hz Zimbabwe grid profile. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 are useful baselines but are not automatically accepted as SAZ, ZERA, or ZETDC approval evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口津巴布韦时，主要实际差距包括：（1）SAZ合格评定及津巴布韦采纳IEC标准证据，不能假定中国GB/T文件会被接受；（2）项目并网、售电、上网或超过适用门槛时的ZERA电力许可和净计量要求；（3）ZETDC配电网接入审查和投运条件；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据；（5）IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（6）针对津巴布韦230/400 V、50 Hz实际电网配置的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量证据。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024可作为有用基准，但不会自动成为SAZ、ZERA或ZETDC批准证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口辛巴威時，主要實際差距包括：（1）SAZ合格評定及辛巴威採納IEC標準證據，不能假定中國GB/T文件會被接受；（2）項目併網、售電、上網或超過適用門檻時的ZERA電力許可和淨計量要求；（3）ZETDC配電網接入審查和投運條件；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據；（5）IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（6）針對辛巴威230/400 V、50 Hz實際電網配置的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質證據。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024可作為有用基準，但不會自動成為SAZ、ZERA或ZETDC批准證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
